## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off new pod structure and align on goals for transitioning to Atlas platform.](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team is transitioning to Atlas platform this week; goal is comfort with Atlas and producing at least one article per client](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [New pod structure introduced; some MEs have new clients (Vivek, Mariana)](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Communication is crucial: use Linear for issues, over-communicate, and pull in Mara as needed](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Short-term challenges expected, but long-term efficiency gains anticipated](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Diverse team across multiple time zones (Brooklyn, Lisbon, GMT+4, Lagos, Florianópolis, Bangalore, Montevideo)](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Varied interests: city biking, chess, embroidery, roller skating, reading](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Work hours generally overlap with San Francisco time, ranging from 3-7 hours](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Atlas Transition Goals

  - [Get comfortable with Atlas platform](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Produce at least one article per client through Atlas (up to five if possible)](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Bank content for following weeks when feasible](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [Familiarize with new clients (Vivek: Abnormal Security, Mariana: Immobit in week 7 of 90-day pilot)](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

### Communication and Issue Reporting

  - [Use Linear for reporting obstacles and issues with Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Engineering team on standby, but can't address all issues immediately](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Over-communicate and pull in Mara where helpful](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)
  - [Consider using Loom for visual issue reporting to minimize back-and-forth](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Team Support and Expectations

  - [Acknowledgment of potential short-term stress and frustration](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [Emphasis on flexibility and teamwork during transition](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Mara available to advocate for team needs, may need context](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)

### Follow-up Meeting

  - [Scheduled for Thursday (potentially Friday) to check in on progress](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Opportunity to address any arising issues mid-week](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Add working hours to Google calendars for team visibility](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Attend handoff calls for new clients to gather context and strategize](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Begin using Atlas to produce at least one article per client this week](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Report any issues or obstacles in Linear](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Prepare for Thursday check-in meeting](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Continue to communicate frequently and support each other through the transition](https://fathom.video/share/xZbnAMK5K6kxBJKYw11iDzuxaXsyZpvt?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
